title: Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with tender chicken and aromatic spices - a royal Indian delicacy
instructions: Soak rice for 30 mins. Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices for 1 hour. Layer rice and chicken in a pot, seal with dough and cook on high heat for 2-3 minutes, then low heat for 45 minutes. Serve hot with raita and pickles.

title: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy South Indian crepe filled with seasoned potatoes and served with sambar and chutney
instructions: Prepare potato masala by frying boiled and mashed potatoes with onions and spices. Heat a non-stick pan, spread dosa batter evenly, add oil, then flip. Add potato masala and serve folded with sambar and chutney.

title: Chocolate Cake
description: Rich, moist chocolate cake with a decadent cocoa flavor - perfect for any celebration
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C. Cream sugar and eggs together. Mix dry ingredients separately. Alternate adding dry mix and milk to egg mixture. Pour into greased pan and bake for 35-40 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.

title: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic Italian pizza with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil on a crispy crust
instructions: Roll pizza dough to desired thickness. Spread tomato sauce, add mozzarella chunks. Bake at 220°C for 15-20 minutes. Top with fresh basil and serve hot.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Creamy Roman pasta with bacon, eggs, and parmesan - simple yet absolutely delicious
instructions: Cook spaghetti until al dente. Fry bacon until crispy. Mix egg yolks with parmesan. Toss hot pasta with bacon fat, then add eggs quickly while pasta is hot for creamy sauce.

title: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken in a rich, creamy tomato-based sauce with aromatic Indian spices
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 2 hours. Grill chicken. Prepare sauce with tomatoes, spices, and cream. Add cooked chicken and simmer. Finish with butter and lemon juice.
